import React from 'react'; const RulesPage = ({ onAccept }) => { return (

Quiz Rules

Important Guidelines:

  • • 25 questions • 30 minutes total time
  • • One question at a time - cannot go back
  • • Must answer current question to proceed
  • • No tab switching allowed (max 2 times)
  • • No copy/paste or right-click
  • • Quiz auto-submits when time ends

⚠️ Violation Policy:

Switching tabs more than 2 times will automatically end your quiz.

); }; export default RulesPage;
